name: get_elevation
description: Get elevation data (altitude above sea level) for one or more geographic coordinates. Uses SRTM (Shuttle Radar Topography Mission) digital elevation model data. Useful for hiking/cycling route planning, terrain analysis, or enriching GPS tracks with elevation profiles.

parameters.name: format_in
parameters.description: Input format of the geometry. Options: 'point' for a single coordinate, 'polyline' for a line of coordinates, 'geojson' for GeoJSON input.

parameters.name: format_out
parameters.description: Output format. Options: 'point', 'polyline', 'geojson'. Default matches format_in.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: The coordinates to query. For 'point' format: [longitude, latitude]. For 'polyline' format: array of [longitude, latitude] pairs.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: The elevation dataset to use. Default is 'srtm' (global, ~30m resolution).
